label: Coral stone cleaning
technicalStandards: Explain porosity, biological growth, moisture, calibrated cleaning pressure, residue removal, and why a test area matters. Never recommend chlorine or high pressure as a universal solution.

label: Restoration and sealing
technicalStandards: Cover preparation, dry-time requirements, breathable penetrating products, compatibility with prior treatments, and slip or appearance considerations without inventing product claims.

label: Pool decks and exterior stone

anchors: pool deck and exterior stone care

technicalStandards: Discuss wet-dry cycling, drainage, salt or chlorinated water, sunscreen oils, UV exposure, surface traction, joints, and irrigation overspray.

label: Commercial and historic stone
technicalStandards: Emphasize test areas, documentation, occupied-site planning, drainage protection, compatible chemistry, phased work, and maintenance records.

label: Miami climate and preventive care
technicalStandards: Connect Miami humidity, rainfall, UV, salt air, shade, landscaping, drainage, and maintenance frequency. Avoid exact service intervals unless framed as inspection guidance.
